git.name: analyze_git_commit_message
git.description: Aggregate tool that runs all enabled Git commit validators and returns a single combined report.

tasks.name: analyze_git_commit_content
tasks.description: Enforces commit content rules from git-commit-format.instructions.md: detects anti-patterns in the commit message body.

tasks.name: analyze_git_commit_format
tasks.description: Enforces commit format rules from git-commit-format.instructions.md: Conventional Commits structure and line-length limits.

editorconfig.name: read_editorconfig_properties
editorconfig.description: Resolves the effective .editorconfig properties for a single file by walking up the directory tree, evaluating glob patterns, and applying section cascading.

tasks.name: get_editorconfig_rules
tasks.description: Returns the effective .editorconfig key/value map that applies to a given file path.
